response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct cloud-based GenAI system design, or hands-on RAG/vector database implementation — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Demonstrated leadership across diverse technical domains and open-source projects
Strong background in cloud-native deployment (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and data systems
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization in experience
AI/ML work appears incidental rather than core focus; duration of GenAI production experience unclear
Lacks documented leadership in technical discovery sessions or enterprise AI deployment cycles

key_factors.factor: Lack of proven GenAI/RAG production experience
